description: Product Description Comfortable Handle Easy-to-grip handle with a classic look and comfort feel. A durable lanyard allows you to hang the shoehorn, saving your space. Telescopic Aluminum Alloy Handle Made of sturdy aluminum alloy that won't bend, break or rust, it's durable for frequent use. Twist-to-lock mechanism allows you to easily adjust the length and lock it firmly & easily. Extra Smooth Plastic Surface Extra sleek surface, wth the wide ergonomic curve, slip on your shoes has never been so easy. 2.6 mm thick premium plastic is built to last and won't break or bend. Portable With Palm Size The shoehorn retracts to a small size (16") and can be detached into 2 parts with only 20cm/8" long and weighs 178g/6.3oz. Premium Travel Bag A high-quality cloth travel bag is included to secure and protect the shoehorn. Easy to carry anywhere when you travel. Twist-to-lock Easily & Firmly Unlock: simply twist the handle slightly counterclockwise Adjust: stretch or compress it to the desired length Lock: twist it a little clockwise Sturdy Long Metal Handle with Sleek Plastic Spoon Put on your shoes has never been so easy with the extra long shoe horn while sitting or standing. With the portable design, you can use it at home or take it with you anywhere. Parameters: Dimensions: Spoon: 8.15 inches/20.7cm, handle: 8 inches/20.5cm Minimum length: 16"/ 40.5cm Maximum length: 38.4"/97.5cm Material: Aluminum Alloy Handle, Plastic Shoe Spoon Net Weight: 6.3 oz/178 g It's a must-have kit for those with hip/ knee/back problems, so they can wear shoes without bending over.
